subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Upon thee be My glory! With thy soul's ear hearken unto the Voice of the Wronged One. This is the Call that the Interlocutor heard on Sinai [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی علیک بهائی ندای مظلوم را بگوش جان بشنو این ندائیست که کلیم در طور
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
